SEARCH
Module overrungl.opengl
Package overrungl.opengl

Interface GL13

All Superinterfaces:
overrun.marshal.DirectAccess
All Known Subinterfaces:
GLLegacy
public interface GL13 extends overrun.marshal.DirectAccess
The OpenGL 1.3 functions.

These extensions are promoted in this version:

  • GL_ARB_transpose_matrix
Since:
0.1.0
Author:
squid233
